title: Mexico Says US Intelligence Aided in Capture of Cartel Boss
title_cn: 墨西哥称美国情报协助抓捕贩毒集团老大
summary: Mexico leaned on US intelligence to arrest an alleged cartel boss with a $5 million bounty on his head, although officials stressed that no foreign agents were on the ground for the operation.

title: Iran Can't Have Nuclear Weapon, Despite 'Hot Mess' of War, Says Ed Price
title_cn: 埃德·普赖斯表示，尽管战争“一团糟”，但伊朗无法拥有核武器
summary: Ed Price, former British trade official and nonresident senior fellow at New York University, said that while the US is embroiled in a 'hot mess' war with Iran, there is still a convincing argument to back the use of force in stopping Iran from having a nuclear weapon. Price also discussed King Charles' visit to Washington and said that US pressure on NATO has 'freaked out' the UK, but is worth it to protect the world order.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oaktree Capital Accuses BJ’s of Breaching Tariff Refund Deal
title_cn: 橡树资本指控 BJ's 违反关税退款协议
summary: Oaktree Capital Management LP sued BJ’s Wholesale Club Inc. for allegedly backing out of a deal to sell its rights to around $29 million in tariff refunds for 70 cents on the dollar.

title: Booking’s 2Q Guidance Misses on Middle East Impact, Shares Slide
title_cn: Booking的第二季度业绩指引未能体现中东影响和股价下滑
summary: Booking Holdings Inc reported worse-than-expected second-quarter guidance for revenue as the Middle East conflict is expected to impact travel demand through the end of June.

title: Red-State AGs Call Out Credit-Rating Companies Over ESG
title_cn: Red-State AG 就 ESG 问题批评信用评级公司
summary: A group of state attorneys general wrote to the US Securities and Exchange Commission and major credit-rating firms, raising concerns about the use of environmental, social and governance factors in downgrade decisions.

title: S&P 500 Falls From Peak as OpenAI Fears Drag on Tech, Chipmakers
title_cn: 由于 OpenAI 担心科技和芯片制造商受到拖累，标准普尔 500 指数从峰值下跌
summary: US stocks declined on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 Index falling from its record, led by a slide in semiconductor and other tech companies.

title: China’s Used Cooking Oil Ships to US as War Drives Biofuel Boom
title_cn: 战争推动生物燃料繁荣，中国用船运往美国
summary: American imports of used cooking oil from China are set to accelerate as increased US biofuel-blending requirements kick in and the Iran war drives up energy costs, making the feedstock a relative bargain.

title: Stocks Slump on OpenAI Report | Closing Bell
title_cn: OpenAI 报告导致股市暴跌 |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Fall as Report on OpenAI Fuels Tech Jitters: Markets Wrap
title_cn: OpenAI 报告引发科技恐慌，股市下跌：市场总结
summary: A selloff in technology giants dragged down stocks as concerns resurfaced over whether vast investments in artificial intelligence will pay off just as traders gear up for a slew of megacap results.

title: US Warns of Sanctions Risks for Chinese Refiners of Iranian Oil
title_cn: 美国警告中国伊朗石油炼油商面临制裁风险
summary: The US warned financial institutions of sanction risks on Chinese oil refineries over ties to Iran, ramping up economic pressure on Tehran and risking tension with Beijing ahead of an expected summit between the country’s leaders.

title: Treasuries Fall as Rising Oil Prices Lift Inflation Expectations
title_cn: 油价上涨提升通胀预期，国债下跌
summary: Treasuries fell, lifting yields to the highest levels in several weeks, as climbing oil prices drove up inflation expectations and curbed expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate cuts.

title: Italy’s Eni Expands Venezuela Push With Orinoco Oil Deal
title_cn: 意大利埃尼集团通过奥里诺科石油交易扩大委内瑞拉的业务
summary: Eni SpA agreed to restart an oil project in Venezuela’s Orinoco Belt, deepening its presence as US sanctions ease.

title: Gold Sinks as US and Iran’s Deadlock on Hormuz Continues
title_cn: 美国和伊朗霍尔木兹海峡僵局持续，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined on concerns that protracted negotiations between the US and Iran could keep the Strait of Hormuz shut for an indefinite period and further heighten inflation risks.

title: FCC to Start Early Review of Disney-Owned Stations
title_cn: FCC 将开始对迪士尼旗下电视台进行早期审查
summary: The Federal Communications Commission will review licenses of stations owned by Walt Disney's ABC network. Regulators say they're looking for potential "unlawful discrimination." This comes after President Donald Trump told ABC to fire late night host Jimmy Kimmel.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Columbia Eyes $485 Million Sale of Taxable, Tax-Exempt Bonds
title_cn: 哥伦比亚计划出售 4.85 亿美元应税免税债券
summary: Columbia University is planning to tap the bond market next month for capital projects and to refinance debt.

title: Oil Back Above $110 as World Awaits US Response to Iran Proposal
title_cn: 世界等待美国对伊朗提案作出回应，油价重回 110 美元上方
summary: Oil rose to the highest level since just before a ceasefire deal between the US and Iran, as traders await Washington’s response to a proposal from Tehran to end the war and potentially reopen of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Hollywood Gear Supplier Quixote to Exit Atlanta Operations
title_cn: 好莱坞装备供应商 Quixote 将退出亚特兰大业务
summary: Quixote, a supplier of gear to movie and TV productions, is shutting down its Atlanta-area operations and exiting many of its soundstages in Los Angeles in the latest sign of the slump in US entertainment filming.

title: Appalachian Lithium Cache Enough to Power 130 Million EVs, USGS Says
title_cn: 美国地质勘探局称，阿巴拉契亚锂缓存足以为 1.3 亿辆电动汽车提供动力
summary: The Appalachian region of the eastern US holds enough lithium to curb America’s reliance on imports for centuries, according to new research by the US Geological Survey, underscoring domestic resource potential as demand for critical minerals accelerates.

title: TD Securities’ Nixon Leaves for National Bank Fixed Income Sales
title_cn: 道明证券的尼克松离开国家银行固定收益销售
summary: Katy Nixon, a director in debt capital markets syndication at TD Securities, is leaving the bank for a fixed income sales role at National Bank of Canada, according to a spokesperson at National Bank.

title: Canada Launches Sovereign Wealth Fund for Major Projects
title_cn: 加拿大为重大项目启动主权财富基金
summary:
Canada will create its first sovereign wealth fund to provide financing for large infrastructure projects and domestic companies, Prime Minister Mark Carney said, pledging to offer Canadian investors the opportunity to buy in.
The new vehicle, dubbed the Canada Strong Fund, will be seeded with C$25 billion ($18.4 billion) from the federal government, Carney announced Monday in Ottawa. It will be professionally managed and independent of the government, meant to “invest alongside the private sector in nation-building projects, on a fully commercial basis,” he said.  Peter Bethlenfalvy, finance minister of Canada’s Ontario Province joined Balance of Power to discuss, the Iran war’s impact on energy markets and efforts by governments to counter it. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jane Street Set to Double Footprint in London Office Move
title_cn: Jane Street 伦敦办公室搬迁规模扩大一倍
summary: Jane Street Group has placed an offer to lease a new London office, a deal that will see the rapidly growing trading firm almost double its footprint in the UK capital.

title: Petroperu Needs to Borrow $2 Billion-Plus to Avert Fuel Shortage
title_cn: Petroperu 需要借款超过 20 亿美元以避免燃料短缺
summary: Petroperu needs more than $2 billion of private funding to avoid fuel shortages as Peru’s struggling state-owned oil refiner navigates high global fuel prices due to war in the Middle East.

title: JPMorgan Taps Former Goldman Exec to Lead Blockchain Unit
title_cn: 摩根大通任命前高盛高管领导区块链部门
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has named former Goldman Sachs Group Inc. executive Oliver Harris to lead its blockchain division Kinexys, as the bank looks to grow the adoption of products and services built using crypto’s underlying technology.

title: HSBC Upgrades US Stocks as Focus Shifts to Earnings From War
title_cn: 汇丰银行上调美股评级，焦点转向战争收益
summary: Signs that geopolitical risks are easing has shifted the narrative back to fundamentals, prompting HSBC Holdings Plc to lift its view on US equities.

title: Dynatrace to Discuss Ideas With Starboard After Firm Takes Stake
title_cn: Dynatrace 将在公司入股后与 Starboard 讨论想法
summary: Dynatrace Inc. said it has met with Starboard Value LP and will discuss ideas with the investment firm, which recently took a stake in the tech company and began pushing for changes.

title: California Jet Fuel Woes Deepen as Asia Flows Hit Decade Low
title_cn: 亚洲流量创十年新低，加州航空燃油困境加剧
summary: Jet fuel exports from Asia to California are at the lowest point in at least a decade, adding another pressure point to a burgeoning air travel crunch on the West Coast stemming from the war on Iran.

title: Budget Fears Weigh on Defense Stocks Ahead of Hegseth Testimony
title_cn: 赫格斯作证前预算担忧令国防股承压
summary: Two months after the Iran war began, euphoria around US defense stocks has faded as investors worry a rally that pushed shares to all-time highs went too far, too fast, and that a massive boost to the defense budget is unlikely.

title: Franklin Shares Rise as $12.4 Billion Flows Into Alternatives
title_cn: 124 亿美元流入另类投资，富兰克林股价上涨
summary: Franklin Resources Inc. took in about $12.4 billion for alternative investments in the first three months of the year, as clients withdrew cash from its stock and bond funds.

title: Spelman's Roz Brewer: Need to Run Colleges Like a Business
title_cn: 斯佩尔曼的罗兹·布鲁尔：需要像企业一样经营大学
summary: Former Sam's Club CEO and Spelman College Interim President Roz Brewer discusses launching a $500 million 'Spelman Forward' campaign aimed at helping students prepare for their future after graduation, and her focus on creating the best education for black women in the country. She talks with Romaine Bostick for "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Testifies He’s Suing OpenAI to Stop Altman’s ‘Looting’
title_cn: 马斯克证实他起诉 OpenAI 是为了阻止奥特曼的“抢劫”
summary: Elon Musk testified Tuesday he’s suing OpenAI and two of its co-founders — Sam Altman and Greg Brockman — because the startup’s pivot from a charity to a for-profit business is wrong and sets a concerning precedent for other philanthropic efforts.

title: Google Signs Deal to Allow AI in Classified Military Work
title_cn: 谷歌签署协议允许人工智能参与机密军事工作
summary: Google has reached an agreement with the US Defense Department to allow its artificial intelligence systems to be used for classified military work, according to a Pentagon official, a deal that came together as researchers at the company protested against it.

title: North Korea’s Nuclear Program Reaches Tipping Point for the US
title_cn: 朝鲜核计划对美国来说已达到临界点
summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, how North Korea’s rapid missile buildup is challenging US defenses and reshaping regional ties.

title: NXP Rallies After Stronger Auto Market Bolsters Forecast
title_cn: 汽车市场走强增强预测后恩智浦股价上涨
summary: NXP Semiconductors NV jumped in late trading after giving an upbeat revenue forecast, a sign the chipmaker is bouncing back from a prolonged auto industry slump and tariff uncertainties.

title: OpenAI-Linked Stocks Slump on Report It Missed Key Targets
title_cn: OpenAI 相关股票因未能实现关键目标而暴跌
summary: A constellation of artificial-intelligence stocks dropped after OpenAI reportedly failed to meet its sales and user targets, rekindling doubts that the hundreds of billions of dollars that big companies are plowing into the technology will deliver sufficient profits anytime soon.

title: DeFi Rescue Hurts Anti-Wall Street Pitch After $10B Run
title_cn: 10B 美元运行后，DeFi 救援伤害了反华尔街的宣传
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Decentralized finance is in the midst of the largest coordinated rescue in its history. This comes a week after a security breach at a small crypto protocol called KelpDAO triggered a $10 billion run on Aave, the largest DeFi lending protocol.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kalshi Discusses Insider Trading Concerns
title_cn: 卡尔希讨论内幕交易问题
summary: Robert Denault, head of enforcement at Kalshi, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Prediction markets have quickly grown from a niche corner of finance to a multibillion-dollar industry with big Wall Street investment, but a growing list of insider trading allegations is bringing concerns about the platforms all the way to the White House.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Hits Back at Growth Fears, Says ‘Firing on All Cylinders’
title_cn: OpenAI 回击增长担忧，表示“全力以赴”
summary:
OpenAI pushed back against concerns over its sales growth on Tuesday, saying its consumer and enterprise businesses are “firing on all cylinders” despite a report about the AI startup missing internal targets.
The ChatGPT creator said it continues to see growth in demand from business customers and its nascent advertising business. “The mood internally is incredibly positive,” the company said in a statement. The Wall Street Journal reported late Monday that OpenAI had fallen short of several internal targets as rivals gained ground. OpenAI described the report as “prime clickbait.”  Rudina Seseri, Glasswing Ventures Founder & Managing Partner joined to discuss on Bloomberg Businessweek Daily.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Up More Than 10% In April, SEC Chair Outline Crypto Plans | Bloomberg Crypto 4/28/2026
title_cn: 4 月份比特币上涨超过 10%，SEC 主席概述加密货币计划彭博加密货币 4/28/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Andreessen Horowitz Former General Partner Arianna Simpson, The Digital Chamber Founder and Chair Perianne Boring, eToro Co-Founder and CEO Yoni Assia, and Kalshi Head of Enforcement Robert DeNault.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: eToro CEO Discusses 24/7 Trading, Retail Investors
title_cn: eToro 首席执行官讨论 24/7 交易、散户投资者
summary: Yoni Assia, co-founder and CEO at eToro, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The US Securities and Exchange Commission gave the go-ahead for sweeping changes to a restriction on day-trading activity by small investors earlier this month in a move cheered by retail brokers.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Perianne Boring Talks Bitcoin 2026, SEC's Atkin
title_cn: Perianne Boring 谈论比特币 2026、SEC 的阿特金
summary: Perianne Boring, founder and chair of The Digital Chamber, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Boring discuss her conversation with SEC Chair Paul Atkins at the Bitcoin 2026 Conference in Las Vegas.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Holding Pattern As An Industry Awaits Clarity Act: Simpson
title_cn: 辛普森：行业保持格局等待澄清法案
summary: Arianna Simpson, former general partner at Andreessen Horowitz, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Bitcoin was lower on Tuesday. The original cryptocurrency reached a record $126,000 in early October, just before the prices of digital assets collapsed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom to Triple US Power Equipment Market to $65 Billion
title_cn: 人工智能的蓬勃发展使美国电力设备市场增至三倍，达到 650 亿美元
summary: US spending on power-plant equipment is expected to triple through 2030, primarily driven by the growth of data centers that may account for as much as 40% of total investment, according to a report Tuesday from Wood Mackenzie Ltd.

title: Apple Readies Photo-Editing Overhaul With New AI Tools in iOS 27
title_cn: Apple 准备在 iOS 27 中使用新的 AI 工具进行照片编辑改革
summary: Apple Inc. is planning a major overhaul of the built-in photo-editing features for the iPhone, iPad and Mac, leaning heavily on artificial intelligence to better compete with Android devices.

title: Algos Are ‘Dominating’ Buy-Side Currency Trading, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，算法正在“主导”买方货币交易
summary: Currency traders’ increasing reliance on algorithms is sparking a debate about the merits of traditional banks versus independent firms in the $9.5 trillion-a-day foreign-exchange market, a new report says.

title: Amazon Inks Deal with OpenAI, Plans New AWS Applications
title_cn: 亚马逊与 OpenAI 合作，计划新的 AWS 应用程序
summary: Amazon Web Services announced a partnership with OpenAI a day after that company ended its exclusivity deal with Microsoft. Amazon also plans to sell AI-powered productivity software for the office. AWS CEO Matt Garman speaks with Bloomberg Tech’s Ed Ludlow. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FDA Plans to Speed Up Drug Trials With Real-Time Data, AI
title_cn: FDA 计划利用实时数据和人工智能加快药物试验
summary: The US Food and Drug Administration plans to cut the time it takes drug companies to test new medicines by getting more visibility into clinical trials as they’re underway.

title: Blue Apron’s Meal Maker Files Bankruptcy After Food Recalls
title_cn: 食品召回后 Blue Apron 的膳食制造商申请破产
summary: FreshRealm, the exclusive maker of meal kits for Blue Apron, filed for bankruptcy with plans to sell its assets and settle a food-recall dispute that helped pressure the company into seeking court protection from creditors.

title: Oil Giant Shell at 'Inflection Point,' Says CEO
title_cn: 首席执行官表示石油巨头壳牌正处于“拐点”
summary: Shell is entering an 'inflection point’ according to CEO Wael Sawan as it faces rising pressure on supply from the conflict in the Middle East and growing demand for energy. Sawan discusses the company’s latest M&A and the global energy crunch with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon to Sell OpenAI Tech After Microsoft Cedes Exclusivity
title_cn: 微软放弃独家经营权后，亚马逊将出售 OpenAI 技术
summary: For the first three years of the artificial intelligence boom, Amazon.com Inc. watched as cloud customers seeking the latest and greatest from OpenAI took their business to Microsoft Corp.

title: Defense Space Startup True Anomaly Raises $650 Million
title_cn: 国防太空初创公司 True Anomaly 融资 6.5 亿美元
summary: True Anomaly has closed a $650 million Series D funding round valuing the company at $2.2 billion. The space startup is among a dozen companies recently named to work on interceptors for the Golden Dome missile defense shield. True Anomaly CEO Even Rogers joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Video Clipping Machine Behind Clavicular’s Viral Fame
title_cn: 锁骨病毒名声背后的视频剪辑机
summary: Videos of the influencer Clavicular are inescapable online. Social media is awash with clips of his sharp-featured face and muscular body — the result of a “looksmaxxing” regimen that can include testosterone injections and even tapping his face with a hammer.

title: Arguments Begin in Musk, Altman Showdown
title_cn: 争论始于马斯克、奥特曼对决
summary: A jury has been selected for the trial between OpenAI firm and Elon Musk, who claims the company abandoned its founding mission as a non-profit. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Dave Lee discusses the impact the case is having on OpenAI’s plans to go public. He joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Graduates Turn to Emergency Degrees To Beat Jobs Crisis
title_cn: 毕业生转向紧急学位以应对就业危机
summary:
UK graduates are turning to emergency degrees to ride out the current jobs crisis and guard against AI.

Irina Anghel explains the surge in demand for master's courses. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CDK Debt Prices Splinter After Failed Challenge to Creditor Pact
title_cn: 挑战债权人协议失败后 CDK 债务价格崩溃
summary: At Brookfield Business Partners-backed CDK Global, a rare, failed attempt by one creditor group to challenge another has fractured the market for the software company’s roughly $5.5 billion debt pile.

title: Data Center-Tied Debt Slides as OpenAI Report Fuels Angst
title_cn: OpenAI 报告加剧担忧，数据中心相关债务下滑
summary: US corporate debt linked to data-center firms fell Tuesday as fears that the AI borrowing boom won’t pay off were reignited by a report that OpenAI missed internal user and sales targets.

title: US Ends Investigation Into Claims WhatsApp Chats Aren’t Private
title_cn: 美国终止对 WhatsApp 聊天非私密性指控的调查
summary: A US agency abruptly closed an investigation into allegations that Meta Platforms Inc. can access encrypted WhatsApp messages, said two people familiar with the matter, ending a law enforcement inquiry into claims that challenge how the company markets the chat service’s privacy.

title: OpenAI Trial Judge Lectures Musk, Altman on Trading Social Media Barbs
title_cn: OpenAI 审判法官向马斯克、奥尔特曼讲述社交媒体交易的倒刺
summary: The judge overseeing a high-profile court case between Elon Musk and OpenAI has asked the tech executives involved in the legal battle to refrain from posting too much on social media, one day after the world’s richest person made a series of jabs at the ChatGPT maker’s leadership on X.

title: Fed to Hold Rates Before Powell Cedes Hot Seat to Warsh
title_cn: 美联储将在鲍威尔将席位让给沃什之前维持利率不变
summary: Markets doubt Trump will get the rapid cuts he wants even after his chosen successor takes the helm.

title: Trump Says Iran Wants Hormuz Open Amid Efforts to End War
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗希望霍尔木兹海峡开放以结束战争
summary: President Donald Trump said Iran has asked the US to lift a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz while the two sides negotiate an end to the two-month war, which has upended global energy supplies.

title: Former FBI Director James Comey Indicted Again Under Trump
title_cn: 前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米在特朗普领导下再次被起诉
summary: Former FBI Director James Comey was indicted for a second time since Donald Trump returned to the White House last year, with prosecutors alleging that he threatened the president’s life in a social media post.

title: Transatlantic Alliance Is More Important Now Than Ever Says King Charles III
title_cn: 查理三世国王表示，跨大西洋联盟现在比以往任何时候都更加重要
summary:
King Charles III addressed a joint session Congress. He spoke of the conflict in the middle east stating it poses immense challenges. As well as how Transatlantic alliance more important now than ever pointing out that the US, and allies are the heart of NATO and that the  US-UK defense ties are measured in not 'years but decades'. 

King Charles also condemned shooting attempt at WH Correspondents Dinner.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon’s Department of War Name Change Will Cost $50 Million
title_cn: 五角大楼战争部更名将耗资5000万美元
summary: The Pentagon has formally asked to change its legal name from the Department of Defense to the Department of War, a move the agency estimates will cost more than $50 million.

title: King Charles III Addresses Congress About US-UK Relations
title_cn: 查理三世国王就美英关系向国会发表讲话
summary: King Charles III addresses a joint session of the US congress to discuss the state of US-UK relations and the recent geopolitical risks facing both countries. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: King Charles Urges US Congress to Reject Pull of Isolationism
title_cn: 查尔斯国王敦促美国国会拒绝孤立主义
summary: King Charles III called on the US to maintain its leadership role in the world in a speech to Congress in which he highlighted NATO and urged “unyielding resolve” to defend Ukraine.

title: Trump Hosts King Charles Amid Strained UK Ties| Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/28/2026
title_cn: 特朗普在英国关系紧张之际接待查尔斯国王|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 28 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss King Charles' visit to Washington and his attempt to heal bonds torn by tariffs and the war in Iran. On today's show, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Partner at Stonecourt Capital Rick Davis, and Province of Ontario Minister of Finance Peter Bethlenfalvy. In addition, Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow interviews AWS CEO Mark Garman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Soldier Pleads Not Guilty to Insider Trading on Maduro Raid
title_cn: 士兵对马杜罗袭击中的内幕交易不认罪
summary: A US Army special forces master sergeant pleaded not guilty to charges of trading on classified information about the operation to capture then-Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro.

title: UAE Quits OPEC as War Upends Oil Markets and Gulf Tensions Rise
title_cn: 由于战争颠覆石油市场和海湾紧张局势加剧，阿联酋退出欧佩克
summary:
The United Arab Emirates will leave OPEC next month, in a significant blow to the group that raises questions about its future at a time when the industry is grappling with the massive supply disruption caused by the Iran war. 
The UAE’s exit May 1 after six decades of membership is the culmination of years of tension with OPEC leader Saudi Arabia both over oil output policy and competition for regional political influence. It’s also the latest indication of how the conflict is reshaping global energy markets: While the UAE has talked in the past about quitting OPEC, Energy Minister Suhail Al Mazrouei said in an interview that the disruption caused by the war created an opportune time for the move. Mia Gindis, Bloomberg News Oil Markets Reporter joins to discuss on Bloomberg Businessweek Daily. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Hails US-UK Bond as King Charles Seeks to Repair Ties
title_cn: 查尔斯国王寻求修复关系，特朗普赞扬美英债券
summary: President Donald Trump said he had a “really good meeting” with King Charles III as part of a visit designed to reaffirm US-UK ties during a low point in bilateral relations.

title: Venezuela Oil Play Beckons US SPAC Blue Water to Maha Deal
title_cn: 委内瑞拉石油公司向美国SPAC Blue Water 发起Maha 交易
summary: Blue Water Acquisition Corp. IV is looking to participate in Venezuela’s rapid oil reopening with a plan to acquire the subsidiaries of Maha Capital AB.

title: Traders Protect Against Selloff Even as Oil Climbs Above $110
title_cn: 尽管油价攀升至 110 美元以上，交易员仍防范抛售
summary: Even as Wall Street calls for oil to hold above $100, stockpiles shrivel and the Strait of Hormuz remains all but shut, some traders are buying options to protect against an abrupt deescalation between the US and Iran.

title: Starmer Defeats Attempt to Force Ethics Probe Over Mandelson
title_cn: 斯塔默挫败了对曼德尔森进行道德调查的企图
summary: Keir Starmer defeated a Conservative attempt to force an investigation into his statements on the Peter Mandelson saga, an outcome that appears to leave the embattled prime minister safe until after next week’s local elections.

title: Lula to Unveil $20 Billion Debt Relief Plan Ahead of Election
title_cn: 卢拉将在选举前公布 200 亿美元债务减免计划
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva plans to roll out a program to renegotiate more than 100 billion reais ($20 billion) in household debt, adding to a string of measures to support consumption as he seeks to bolster his popularity ahead of Brazil’s October election.

title: Shell CEO Says Blockade May Mean Energy Shortages Last Into 2027
title_cn: 壳牌首席执行官表示封锁可能意味着能源短缺将持续到 2027 年
summary: The oil and liquefied natural gas shortages caused by the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz are likely to drag on for months and possibly into next year, Shell Plc Chief Executive Officer Wael Sawan said.

title: Google Drops Out of Pentagon Drone Swarm Contest After Advancing
title_cn: 谷歌在晋级后退出五角大楼无人机群竞赛
summary: Google abruptly dropped out of a $100 million Pentagon prize challenge to create technology for voice-controlled, autonomous drone swarms after it was among the successful submissions, according to people briefed on the matter.

title: Japanese Crude Supertanker Manages Hormuz Exit in War First
title_cn: 日本原油超级油轮在战争中首次管理霍尔木兹出口
summary: A laden supertanker linked to Japan appears to have completed a transit through the Strait of Hormuz, in what may be the first successful attempt by an oil carrier from the country to leave the Persian Gulf since the Iran war began.

title: Magyar Seeks Zelenskiy Meeting to Reset Hungary-Ukraine Ties
title_cn: 马扎尔寻求与泽连斯基会面以重置匈牙利与乌克兰关系
summary: Hungary’s incoming premier asked Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy for a meeting to reset ties that plumbed unprecedented lows during outgoing leader Viktor Orban’s tenure.

title: Kimmel Defends Joke in Latest Fight With Trump
title_cn: 基梅尔在与特朗普的最新战斗中为笑话辩护
summary: Late night host Jimmy Kimmel is defending a joke he made that caused President Donald Trump to say Walt Disney's ABC should fire him. Kimmel said on Monday night's show that he Trump both have a "right to free speech." Bloomberg's Lucas Shaw reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani Pushes to Shrink NY Hedge-Fund, Private-Equity Tax Break
title_cn: 马姆达尼推动缩减纽约对冲基金和私募股权税收减免
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is delaying the city’s $127 billion budget as he pressures the state to limit a tax credit used by hedge funds, private equity firms and other businesses.

title: UAE Leaving OPEC at Right Time, Energy Minister Says
title_cn: 能源部长表示，阿联酋适时退出欧佩克
summary: The United Arab Emirates is leaving OPEC on May 1, dealing a blow to the group and its leader Saudi Arabia. UAE Energy Minister Suhail Al Mazrouei tells Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche that the timing is right because of the war in Iran. Bercetche spoke to him on the phone and she reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
